purpose: Choose Answerable Faith articles from the approved app question bank using people-first SEO, answer-engine visibility, topical authority and pastoral usefulness.
core_rule: The question bank determines what may be written. Search demand, trends, cluster gaps and answer-system usefulness determine what should be written next.
hard_eligibility_gate: The candidate must be one public-safe question-and-answer card from answerable-blog-question-ledger.json.
The question_id, core answer, reader question, H1 meaning, keyword family and search intent must not duplicate existing coverage.
The topic must fit Answerable Faith’s apologetics, pastoral and theological purpose.
The article must be supportable from Scripture and reliable named sources without invented claims.
A trend must never create a topic outside the approved question bank.

publishing_lanes.MO: Evergreen demand: prioritise durable high-intent questions such as suffering, Bible reliability, salvation, doubt and Jesus.
publishing_lanes.WE: Cluster building: prioritise an unused question that deepens a strong existing topic cluster and creates useful internal links.
publishing_lanes.FR: Trend responsive: prioritise a rising or timely search question only when it maps naturally to an unused approved question card; otherwise publish the best evergreen candidate.

signals_in_priority_order: Google Search Console rising queries, impressions, low-ranking pages and queries close to page one when access is available.
Bing Webmaster Tools keyword data and recommendations when access is available.
Current search results, related questions, autocomplete-style wording, competitor gaps and weak existing answers.
Current cultural or news interest only when an approved question card genuinely fits.
Existing Answerable Faith topic clusters, internal-link gaps and likely follow-up questions.
article_visibility_requirements: Use one clear primary query and one coherent secondary query family.
Use a precise question-led H1 and answer the question within the first 100 words.
Include a self-contained 40–60 word Answer in brief that can be quoted accurately by answer systems.
Use practical question-led H2 sections, short paragraphs and descriptive internal links.
Use visible authorship, accurate dates, canonical URLs and matching BlogPosting and BreadcrumbList structured data.
Keep visible page content consistent with structured data.
Keep robots.txt open to legitimate search crawlers and OAI-SearchBot unless the site owner changes that policy.
Do not keyword-stuff, manufacture trends or publish thin content.

continuity_fallback.condition: No unused eligible question card is available, or the full question bank is temporarily unavailable.
continuity_fallback.action: Refresh exactly one existing bank-backed article with the highest verified search opportunity. Improve clarity, answer coverage, internal links, metadata or structured data without changing the source question_id or creating a duplicate URL.
prohibited: Do not invent a new app question or answer.
Do not disable, pause or delete the automation.
Do not claim a new article was published when the run only refreshed an existing page.
